meta.title: Pricing — BoxSpot
meta.description: See what it costs to advertise on pizza boxes. Interactive price calculator. Compare with Facebook and Google Ads.

calculator.title: Price calculator
calculator.comparisonNote: Same impressions via Facebook Ads: {facebookCost} DKK — Google Ads: {googleCost} DKK.
calculator.impressionsNote: Based on 2.8 people per box on average.

guarantee.title: Distribution guarantee
guarantee.text: If the first batch of boxes isn't fully distributed within 30 days, the next month is free.

scarcity.text: Each box has a maximum of 4 ad placements. Once a restaurant's slots are filled, new advertisers are queued for the next batch.

meta.title: Free packaging for restaurants — BoxSpot
meta.description: Get free packaging with your logo and branding. No contract, no cost. BoxSpot delivers directly to your restaurant.

restaurants.title: Free packaging for your restaurant
restaurants.subtitle: You already pay for boxes. We give you better ones — at no cost.

offer.title: What you get
items: Professionally printed pizza boxes with your name, logo and branding
Higher quality than the plain white or brown boxes you buy today
Professional graphic design of your box layout — included
Updated design every quarter — no extra cost
No contract. No minimum order. No lock-in.

cost.title: What it costs
cost.text: Nothing. The packaging is funded by advertisers — local businesses whose ads appear on the box sides. They're not competitors to your restaurant.

guarantee.title: Quality guarantee
guarantee.text: If the quality doesn't match or exceed your current boxes, keep what you've used and we'll collect the rest. No questions.

cta.title: Get started
cta.text: Contact us with your restaurant name and address. We'll get back to you with a packaging proposal within 48 hours.

meta.title: About — BoxSpot
meta.description: BoxSpot is a brand by SeedWork Co.. We connect local advertisers with local restaurants through packaging.

about.title: About BoxSpot
about.intro: BoxSpot turns packaging into an advertising medium. Restaurants get free, professionally printed packaging. Advertisers get physical visibility in local homes. The money stays in the local community.

mission.title: Local value
mission.text: Every year, Danish businesses send millions of kroner to international ad platforms. Most of it reaches people who never set foot in the shop. BoxSpot gives local businesses access to advertising that actually reaches their neighbours — on the kitchen table, not in a feed. The packaging already exists. We give it a purpose beyond keeping the food warm.

parent.title: SeedWork Co.
parent.text: BoxSpot is a brand by SeedWork Co. (CVR 46232194), which also operates MadBud.dk — an ethical food delivery platform with salaried employment instead of gig work. Both brands work to strengthen local economies in Danish cities.

founder.title: Founder
founder.name: Barnabás Skoda
founder.text: Electronics Engineering student at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU) in Sønderborg. Member of SDU Startup Station. Founder of SeedWork Co.. Started BoxSpot to give local businesses a real alternative to digital advertising — and to give restaurants better packaging at no cost.

location.title: Location
location.text: BoxSpot is based in Sønderborg, Southern Denmark. Supported by SDU Startup Station. Operating across Sønderborg, Nordborg and Aabenraa with national ambitions.

meta.title: Contact — BoxSpot
meta.description: Contact BoxSpot for a quote on pizza box advertising or free packaging for your restaurant.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Email kontakt@boxspot.dk directly.

founder.title: Founder
founder.name: Barnabás Skoda
founder.bio: Electronics Engineering student at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU) in Sønderborg. Member of SDU Startup Station. Founder of SeedWork Co., operating BoxSpot and MadBud.dk.

assets.title: Brand assets
assets.description: Logo, colour profile and brand guide available for download.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.text: SeedWork Co. (CVR 46232194), Sønderborg, Denmark is the data controller for personal data processing on boxspot.dk.

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.text: We only collect information you submit via our contact form: name, company, email, phone number and message.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.text: Your information is used solely to respond to your enquiry and potentially prepare a quote.

sections.title: Storage
sections.text: We store your contact details for up to 12 months after your enquiry, unless we enter an agreement requiring longer retention.

sections.title: Third parties
sections.text: The contact form is provided by Formspree. See their privacy policy at formspree.io. We do not share your data with other third parties.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.text: We use Plausible Analytics, which does not use cookies and does not collect personal data. Plausible is GDPR-compliant.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.text: You have the right to view, correct or delete your personal data. Contact us at kontakt@boxspot.dk.
